mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_notification (user_id, type, title, content, ref_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{refId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE t_notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE t_notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
